name: loading-section
description: Unified loading state component: three modes (spinner/skeleton/section) in one partial. spinner: SVG ring for action feedback. skeleton: shimmer layout placeholder. section: real content slot with overlay spinner for blocking async ops. role=status/region, aria-live, fullPage overlay, showTip, CSP-clean. Zero JS.
docs: Copies loading-section.jte to your JTE root at lievit/loading-section.jte. Three modes: @template.lievit.loading-section() (spinner, default), @template.lievit.loading-section(mode="skeleton", skeletonShape="lines"), @template.lievit.loading-section(mode="section") { content }. Self-contained: no cross-partial deps at runtime. The source is yours: edit freely.
